「 You've never been on quite amazing terms with your step-brother; the fact that he never seemed to leave his room and only glared whenever you tried to talk to him never helped with the bonding. Still, you thought he would be at least a little bit more grateful that you drove all the way to his college to pick him up... but as soon as you get home it's back with the scowling and the glaring. The only time he seems to leave his room it's late at night - and tonight is no exception... until he finds you passed out on the couch after a night out. Unfortunately for you, Daniel is very horny, and he thinks being a decent person is overrated, anyway. 」
